title: Davallia brachycarpa
taxonomy: Davallia brachycarpa is classified as a species of fern in the family Davalliaceae. This family is a part of the larger order Polypodiales. Within the kingdom Plantae, Davallia brachycarpa belongs to the class Polypodiopsida. The class is further divided into the subclass Polypodiidae, which includes Davallia brachycarpa and other related species. This classification system is based on the plant's morphological and molecular characteristics.
